---
pagetitle: "Submit Workshop - Architecture 2.0"
description: "Submit workshops, CFPs, tutorials, and venues relevant to Architecture 2.0."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap submit-page">
<header class="site-masthead">
  <span class="pill">Architecture 2.0</span>
  <span class="pill hot">Workshop submissions</span>
</header>

<section class="site-hero">
  <div class="hub-kicker">Submit</div>
  <h1>Submit a workshop</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Add a workshop, tutorial, CFP, seminar, or venue where this community can gather.</p>
</section>

<p class="site-lede">
Use this page to prepare a workshop card for the community tracker. The final
step opens a GitHub issue form, which keeps the submission attributable and lets
the workflow create a pull request for maintainer review.
</p>

<div class="artifact-submit-layout">
  <form id="submission-form" class="submit-form">
    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Workshop card</h2>
      <label>
        <span>Workshop or venue name <b>*</b></span>
        <input name="workshop_title" required placeholder="Architecture 2.0 Workshop">
      </label>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Website URL <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="url" required type="url" placeholder="https://...">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Primary topic <b>*</b></span>
          <select name="category" required>
            <option>Architecture 2.0</option>
            <option>ML for Systems</option>
            <option>Agentic AI</option>
            <option>Computer Architecture</option>
            <option>EDA and Tools</option>
            <option>Benchmarks and Datasets</option>
            <option>Education</option>
            <option>Community</option>
          </select>
        </label>
      </div>
      <label>
        <span>Short description <b>*</b></span>
        <textarea name="description" required rows="3" placeholder="A workshop focused on agentic AI for computing-systems design and auditable hardware design loops."></textarea>
      </label>
    </section>

    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>Venue details</h2>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Venue or host <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="venue" required placeholder="ISCA 2026">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Date or year <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="date" required placeholder="June 2026 or Annual workshop series">
        </label>
      </div>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Event start date <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="event_start" required type="date">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Event end date <b>*</b></span>
          <input name="event_end" required type="date">
        </label>
      </div>
      <label>
        <span>Location</span>
        <input name="location" placeholder="Raleigh, North Carolina; online; hybrid">
      </label>
    </section>

    <section class="submit-section">
      <h2>People and calls</h2>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>Organizer(s)</span>
          <input name="organizers" placeholder="Example Lab and collaborators">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Institution(s)</span>
          <input name="institution" placeholder="Example University">
        </label>
      </div>
      <div class="artifact-submit-two">
        <label>
          <span>CFP or submission URL</span>
          <input name="submission_url" type="url" placeholder="https://...">
        </label>
        <label>
          <span>Submission deadline</span>
          <input name="deadline" placeholder="February 15, 2026">
        </label>
      </div>
    </section>

    <div class="submit-actions">
      <button class="site-action submit-button" type="submit">Continue submission <span class="arr" aria-hidden="true">&rarr;</span></button>
      <button class="site-action secondary submit-button" type="button" id="copy-submit-body">Copy generated body</button>
    </div>
  </form>

  <div class="submit-aside">
    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Public card preview</h2>
      <div class="submit-card-demo">
        <div class="submit-card-title"><span id="preview-title">Workshop name</span><span>&nearr;</span></div>
        <p id="preview-description">Short description appears here.</p>
        <div class="submit-card-credit">
          <span id="preview-venue">Venue or host</span>
          <span id="preview-date">Date or year</span>
          <span id="preview-location">Location</span>
          <span id="preview-organizers">Organizer(s)</span>
        </div>
        <div class="tool-card-categories">
          <span class="tool-card-category" id="preview-category">Topic</span>
          <span class="tool-card-tag" id="preview-deadline">Deadline</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Generated issue body</h2>
      <textarea id="submit-body-preview" readonly rows="16" aria-label="Generated workshop submission body"></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="submit-preview-card">
      <h2>Other submissions</h2>
      <p>Artifacts and readings use the same site-guided GitHub issue to pull request flow.</p>
      <p><a href="/submit.html">Submit an artifact</a></p>
      <p><a href="/submit-resource.html">Submit a resource</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
window.arch2SubmitConfig = {
  template: "submit_workshop.yml",
  titlePrefix: "[Workshop]: ",
  titleField: "workshop_title",
  titleFallback: "<workshop name>",
  labels: [
    ["Workshop or venue name", "workshop_title"],
    ["Website URL", "url"],
    ["Venue or host", "venue"],
    ["Date or year", "date"],
    ["Event start date", "event_start"],
    ["Event end date", "event_end"],
    ["Primary topic", "category"],
    ["Short description", "description"],
    ["Location", "location"],
    ["Organizer(s)", "organizers"],
    ["Institution(s)", "institution"],
    ["CFP or submission URL", "submission_url"],
    ["Submission deadline", "deadline"]
  ],
  preview: [
    ["#preview-title", "workshop_title", "Workshop name"],
    ["#preview-description", "description", "Short description appears here."],
    ["#preview-venue", "venue", "Venue or host"],
    ["#preview-date", "date", "Date or year"],
    ["#preview-location", "location", "Location"],
    ["#preview-organizers", "organizers", "Organizer(s)"],
    ["#preview-category", "category", "Topic"],
    ["#preview-deadline", "deadline", "Deadline"]
  ]
};
</script>
<script src="submit-form.js"></script>
```
